since_last: 34% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.71%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.32% · BTC +0.00% · Gold +0.47% · Nasdaq100 -0.40%. 34% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.71%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.71%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -11.73%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.24%, POWL +5.00%, AAPL +4.08%, ORCL +4.06%, PINS +3.56%. Laggards: DELL -11.73%, SKHY -8.47%, MU -7.79%, MRVL -7.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.70% at $135.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
